message:
fix(runtime): deterministic obligation IDs, region rollback coverage, and counter-lag tests

obligation_table.rs: pending_obligation_ids_for_task() and
pending_obligation_ids_for_region() now sort results after
collection.  Arena slot reuse can cause insertion order to diverge
from ObligationId ordering; without sorting, callers that iterate
the returned Vec see non-deterministic sequences.  Adds a new test
pending_obligation_ids_for_task_is_sorted_after_slot_reuse that
removes and reuses a middle slot to exercise this.

region_table.rs: Two new tests covering create_child edge cases:
  - create_child_rolls_back_when_parent_is_closed: verifies the
    child insert is atomically rolled back when the parent has
    already begun closing, and table.len() remains correct.
  - create_child_uses_meet_for_effective_budget: verifies the
    effective budget is the meet (component-wise min) of parent
    and child budgets for deadline, poll_quota, cost_quota, and
    priority.

global_injector.rs: Two new tests for the CAS counter saturation
logic when heap visibility races ahead of the counter update:
  - timed_pop_does_not_underflow_when_counter_lags
  - timed_pop_if_due_does_not_underflow_when_counter_lags
Both simulate a task visible in the timed heap while pending_count
is still 0, verifying the counter saturates at zero.

priority.rs: Strengthens the pop_with_lane_rng_tiebreak test by
adding a fourth hint sequence (hints_d, duplicate of hints_c) to
verify both determinism properties — same hints yield same order,
and that property holds for multiple distinct hint sequences.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
